description: E2E test of CTO Play workflow. ⚠️ CRITICAL RULES: (1) Use MCP tools ONLY (cto___intake, cto___play, cto___jobs). (2) NEVER run 'intake' CLI locally. (3) NEVER create or modify .tasks/ folders locally - only Morgan pod does this in-cluster. (4) NEVER run 'intake parse-prd', 'intake generate-docs', or any intake subcommand. (5) All task generation happens IN-CLUSTER via Argo pods. (6) Play workflow is triggered by merging Morgan's PR with tasks.json.

knownIssues.title: Intake CLI JSON parsing bug in provider.rs
knownIssues.description: The intake CLI in CLI mode fails to parse JSON when Claude returns explanation text mixed with JSON. Fix: Change text.find() to text.contains() in provider.rs line ~162.
knownIssues.action: Test fix locally, then create PR to merge to develop, rebuild intake image

knownIssues.title: Morgan auto-assign sometimes fails
knownIssues.description: Linear user search API can be flaky. Morgan gets set as delegate (sub-assignment) which still triggers webhook.
knownIssues.workaround: If auto-assign fails, manually assign Morgan via Linear API. Morgan ID: 11f0c7e3-dbf5-45fe-b15e-2a235f4d0013

prerequisites: provider.rs fix must be merged to develop and intake image rebuilt before in-cluster intake will work
Test the fix locally first: cargo build -p intake && intake parse-prd alerthub-e2e-test/prd.md --use-cli
All local services must be running: controller, PM, healer, tunnel
Port forwards must be active: ArgoCD (8080), Argo Workflows (2746)

userStories.title: Test intake fix locally before deployment
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify the provider.rs fix works locally before deploying to cluster
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout the branch with the fix: git checkout ralph/e2e-alerthub-test
Build intake locally: cargo build -p intake
Test the fix: ./target/debug/intake parse-prd alerthub-e2e-test/prd.md --num-tasks 15 --use-cli --cli-type claude
Verify tasks.json is generated with valid JSON (not mixed with text)
If test passes, create PR to merge provider.rs fix to develop
Wait for intake image to rebuild and deploy
Log to progress.txt: 'Local intake test: PASS/FAIL'
userStories.notes: ⚠️ BLOCKER: In-cluster intake will fail until this fix is deployed. Test locally first!

userStories.title: Start all local services and webhook tunnel from scratch
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to start all services AND the Cloudflare tunnel from a stopped state before running E2E tests
acceptanceCriteria: ASSUMPTION: All services are currently STOPPED - starting fresh
FIRST: cd to project root and source environment: cd /Users/jonathonfritz/code/work-projects/5dlabs/cto && source .env.local
Delegate to @local-services: 'Source .env.local then start all services AND tunnel using background processes'
Start services: 1) just dev-controller &, 2) just dev-pm &, 3) just dev-healer-play-api &
Start Cloudflare tunnel: cloudflared tunnel --config config/cloudflared-pm-dev.yaml run &
Wait 10 seconds for services to initialize
Start port forwards: kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server -n argocd 8080:80 &
Start port forwards: kubectl port-forward svc/argo-workflows-server -n automation 2746:2746 &
Delegate to @local-services: 'Health check ALL endpoints with retries (max 3 attempts, 5s between)'
Health check LOCAL: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/health (PM)
Health check LOCAL: curl -sf http://localhost:8083/health (Healer)
Health check TUNNEL (CRITICAL): curl -sf https://pm-dev.5dlabs.ai/health - MUST pass for webhooks
⚠️ DO NOT proceed to intake until tunnel health check passes - Linear webhooks require it
Delegate to @local-services: 'Report full status including PIDs, port forwards, and tunnel status'
Log to progress.txt: 'Services started at [timestamp]: PM=OK, Healer=OK, Tunnel=OK, Ports=OK'
userStories.notes: MUST source .env.local for env vars (LINEAR_WEBHOOK_URL, etc). Tunnel is REQUIRED for webhooks.

userStories.title: Pre-flight checks and cleanup before intake
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify ALL systems are ready and clean before attempting intake
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @local-services: 'Run cleanup then full pre-flight checklist'
CLEANUP FIRST: Delete any stuck CodeRuns, pods, jobs, PVCs from previous runs
CLEANUP: kubectl delete coderuns -n cto --all
CLEANUP: kubectl delete pods -n cto -l component=code-runner --force --grace-period=0
CLEANUP: kubectl delete jobs -n cto -l component=code-runner
CLEANUP: Patch any Terminating PVCs to remove finalizers
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 1: Verify .env.local is sourced (echo $LINEAR_WEBHOOK_URL should have value)
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 2: PM Server local health: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 3: Healer local health: curl -sf http://localhost:8083/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 4: Tunnel health (CRITICAL): curl -sf https://pm-dev.5dlabs.ai/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 5: Argo Workflows reachable: curl -sf http://localhost:2746/api/v1/info
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 6: kubectl context valid: kubectl cluster-info
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 7: No stuck resources: kubectl get pods -n cto | grep -E 'Error|Pending' should be empty
CONFIG CHECK: Read cto-config.json, verify defaults.intake.local is FALSE
CONFIG CHECK: Verify defaults.play.autoMerge is true
⚠️ ALL PRE-FLIGHT CHECKS MUST PASS before proceeding to US-003 (intake)
Log to progress.txt: 'Pre-flight complete at [timestamp]: Cleanup done, all checks PASSED'
userStories.notes: GATE - Do NOT proceed to intake (US-003) until ALL pre-flight checks pass. Cleanup CodeRuns FIRST - they are the source of pods/jobs.

userStories.title: Initiate intake via CTO MCP tool (in-cluster) - NO LOCAL CLI
userStories.description: ⚠️ MUST use cto___intake() MCP tool. NEVER run 'intake' CLI locally. The MCP tool creates Linear issues and triggers Argo workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: ⚠️ PROHIBITED: 'intake parse-prd', 'intake generate-docs', creating .tasks/ folders locally
⚠️ ONLY the in-cluster Morgan pod creates task files - NOT you
Call MCP tool: cto___intake(project_name='alerthub-e2e-test')
Verify response contains 'linear_project_id' - if missing, STOP and debug
Verify response contains 'linear_issue_id' - this is the PRD issue ID
VERIFY Linear issue exists: curl Linear API to confirm issue was created
Morgan is auto-assigned as DELEGATE (sub-assignment), which triggers webhook
Webhook fires to PM server → Argo Workflow created
Call cto___jobs(include=['intake']) to see intake workflow running in Argo
⚠️ If no workflow appears after 30s, check PM server logs and webhook tunnel
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify Morgan agent session created, first thought within 10s'
Log to progress.txt: intake workflow name, Linear issue ID, Morgan assigned as delegate
userStories.notes: Morgan is assigned as DELEGATE (sub-assignment), not primary assignee. This still triggers the webhook. ⚠️ BLOCKER: If in-cluster intake fails with JSON parse error, the provider.rs fix needs to be deployed first (see US-000).

userStories.title: Monitor intake completion and verify Morgan creates PR
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify intake completes AND Morgan commits tasks.json and creates PR
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: cto___jobs(include=['intake']) - poll until 'Succeeded' or 'Failed'
IF FAILED: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'IMMEDIATELY capture logs from intake pod before it terminates'
IF FAILED: Check if error is JSON parsing - if so, provider.rs fix needs deployment
IF FAILED: @healer-monitor must report: logs captured [YES/NO], remediation CRD exists [YES/NO]
IF FAILED + NO REMEDIATION: BLOCK - do not retry. Investigate why Healer didn't create remediation.
IF SUCCEEDED: Verify Morgan created a PR with tasks.json to the docs repository
Verify PR contains: tasks.json with tasks array, task-N/ folders with prompts
Task 1 should have agentHint='bolt' (infrastructure always first)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Check Morgan session activities: thought/action/response flow, plan checklist updates'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Check for any errors in intake workflow logs'
Verify Linear PRD issue has agent dialogue populated (not empty)
Log PR number, task count, and agent assignments to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Morgan runs IN-CLUSTER, generates tasks, commits to repo, creates PR. The PR must be merged before Play can start.

userStories.title: Merge Morgan's PR to trigger Play workflow
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to merge Morgan's tasks PR which triggers the Play workflow
acceptanceCriteria: Find Morgan's PR: gh pr list --author '5DLabs-Morgan' --state open
Review PR contains valid tasks.json and task docs
Merge the PR: gh pr merge <PR_NUMBER> --merge
Merge triggers Play workflow automatically via webhook
Call cto___jobs(include=['play']) to see play workflow starting
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Verify Healer received session notification'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify task issues created, Bolt assigned as delegate to Task 1'
Log to progress.txt: PR merged, play workflow started
userStories.notes: Play is triggered by merging Morgan's PR, not by manually calling cto___play(). The merge webhook starts the orchestration.

userStories.title: Monitor Play agent sequence with Linear dialogue verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify agents execute in order AND Linear activities stream correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: cto___play_status() periodically to track progress
Verify stages: infrastructure (Bolt) → implementation (Rex/Blaze) → quality (Cleo) → security (Cipher) → testing (Tess) → integration (Atlas)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'For each agent stage, verify: delegate assignment, first thought within 10s, activities streaming, final response'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Watch pod logs for tool inventory mismatch, MCP init failures (A10/A11/A12)'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Monitor service health throughout, restart any crashed services'
Log each stage transition to progress.txt with timestamps
userStories.notes: Each agent runs as CodeRun pod with Linear sidecar emitting activities.

userStories.title: Test two-way communication (user input)
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify users can send input to running agents via Linear
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Test user input capability during an active agent session'
While an agent is running, send a comment/prompt via Linear mentioning the agent
Verify prompt activity appears in agent session
Verify agent's sidecar detects input via polling (get_session_activities)
Verify input is forwarded to agent via FIFO (if implemented)
Log test result to progress.txt: 'User input test: PASS/FAIL'
userStories.notes: Tests the input_poll_task in status-sync.rs. REQUIRES: Active CodeRun with agent running.

userStories.title: Verify Healer and Linear monitoring integration
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm both monitoring subagents detected all relevant events
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Final report: any A10/A11/A12 alerts? GitHub issues created?'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Final report: all sessions complete? Any missing activities? Delegates correct throughout?'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Final status report: any service restarts during test?'
Cross-reference: Healer session tracking matches Linear session states
Log combined monitoring summary to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Validates both monitoring layers caught all events. REQUIRES: Play workflow must complete first.

userStories.title: Complete full lifecycle verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm entire in-cluster lifecycle completed successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: cto___play_status() - verify workflow 'Succeeded'
Verify PR was created by implementation agent's GitHub App
Verify PR was merged by Atlas (autoMerge=true)
All CodeRun pods should have completed successfully
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify all agent sessions show state=complete with final response activity'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Cleanup: stop all background services if test complete'
Log final summary to progress.txt: workflow names, duration, success/failure
userStories.notes: Full E2E: cto___intake() → Linear → Webhook → Morgan pod → tasks.json PR → Merge → Play workflow → CodeRuns → Merged implementation PR. This is the final verification.
